# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:grant_peerage = {
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/law_icons/crownland_diets.dds"
	potential = {
		is_noble = no
		is_ruler_of_own_country = no
		is_heir_of_own_country = no
		is_in_exile_pool = no
		is_in_void = no
		has_dlc_feature = ep2_content
		scope:actor ?= {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		}
	}

	show_requirements = yes

	possible = {
		owner ?= {
			authority >= ROOT.peerage_authority_cost
		}
		is_heir_of_own_country = no
		custom_tooltip = {
			text = ideology_not_too_far_tt
			NOR = {
				AND = {
					owner.ruler ?= {
						OR = {
							has_reactionary_ideology = yes
							has_conservative_ideology = yes
						}
					}
					has_socialist_ideology = yes
				}
				AND = {
					owner.ruler ?= {
						has_reactionary_ideology = yes
					}
					has_progressive_ideology = yes
				}
				AND = {
					owner.ruler ?= {
						has_liberal_ideology = yes
					}
					has_liberal_ideology = yes
				}
				AND = {
					owner.ruler ?= {
						has_socialist_ideology = yes
					}
					has_conservative_ideology = yes
				}
				AND = {
					owner.ruler ?= {
						NOR = {
							has_socialist_ideology = yes
							has_progressive_ideology = yes
						}
					}
					has_reactionary_ideology = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}

	effect = {
		owner = {
			add_modifier = {
				name = modifier_granted_character_peerage
				days = short_modifier_time
				multiplier = ROOT.peerage_authority_cost
			}
		}
		set_is_noble = yes
		if = {
			limit = {
				interest_group ?= {
					NOT = {
						law_stance = {
							law = law_type:law_monarchy
							value < neutral
						}
					}
				}
			}
			interest_group ?= {
				add_modifier = {
					name = modifier_granted_peerage
					days = normal_modifier_time
				}
			}
		}
	}

	should_ai_evaluate = {
		country_rank >= rank_value:minor_power # Don't burn performance on tiny AI countries messing around with character interactions
		relative_authority >= 0.5
	}

	ai_chance = {
		value = -25
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						owner.ruler ?= {
							has_socialist_ideology = yes # Hail to the Red King
						}
						has_socialist_ideology = yes
					}
					AND = {
						owner.ruler ?= {
							has_progressive_ideology = yes
						}
						has_progressive_ideology = yes
					}
					AND = {
						owner.ruler ?= {
							has_liberal_ideology = yes
						}
						has_liberal_ideology = yes
					}
					AND = {
						owner.ruler ?= {
							has_reactionary_ideology = yes
						}
						has_reactionary_ideology = yes
					}
					AND = {
						owner.ruler ?= {
							has_conservative_ideology = yes
						}
						has_conservative_ideology = yes
					}
				}
			}
			add = 25
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				interest_group ?= {
					ig_approval <= 5
				}
			}
			add = 15
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				this.ideology = owner.ruler.ideology
			}
			add = 10
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				loyalty > 75
			}
			add = 10
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner ?= {
					relative_authority <= 0.75
				}
			}
			add = -50
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner ?= {
					has_journal_entry = je_tenpo_crisis
					has_variable = ai_tenpo_reform_agenda
				}
				is_interest_group_type = ig_petty_bourgeoisie
			}
			add = 100
		}
	}
}
